To get $DOGS after the listing, we are launching a second airdrop of $DOGS worth $50,000,000. You need to connect your wallet and confirm all transactions. You can also invite friends and earn $DOGS for each friend who joins. You have the opportunity to earn up to 500,000 $DOGS every day.
